recipe.title: Chicken Enchiladas

ingredients.name: sea salt and freshly-cracked black pepper
large flour tortillas
ingredients.note: source default; corn tortillas are optional variation

ingredients.name: red enchilada sauce
ingredients.note: homemade linked sauce is source recommendation

ingredients.name: American-style chili powder
ingredients.note: not pure cayenne; primary red sauce seasoning

steps.text: Preheat oven to 350°F and prepare homemade red enchilada sauce.
steps.visualCue: brick-red sauce simmering with low bubbles and glossy spoon-coating body
steps.textureCue: dry spices blooming into a smooth chile roux, then loosening into glossy sauce
steps.runwayRisk: sauce can look like tomato soup unless chili roux texture and deep red-brown color are specified

steps.text: Cook flour and oil for sauce roux, then whisk in chili powder, garlic powder, cumin and oregano.
steps.visualCue: oil and flour turn sandy, then red spices darken and bloom
steps.textureCue: matte roux becomes rust-red paste before stock is added
steps.runwayRisk: powders may float unnaturally unless whisk contact and saucepan scale are clear

steps.text: Gradually whisk stock into the spiced roux and simmer until slightly thickened.
steps.visualCue: thin stock stream disappears into sauce, bubbles slow as sauce thickens
steps.textureCue: watery liquid becomes smooth glossy sauce with visible viscosity
steps.runwayRisk: thickening is subtle; use spoon-coating and low bubble cues

steps.text: Saute diced onion in oil over medium-high heat.
steps.visualCue: onion cubes soften and turn translucent at the edges
steps.textureCue: sharp white onion softens into glossy translucent pieces
steps.runwayRisk: onions can be visually generic; pair with pan sizzle and close macro

steps.text: Add diced chicken and green chiles, season, and saute until chicken is cooked through.
steps.visualCue: small chicken cubes turn opaque with green chile flecks and steam
steps.textureCue: raw glossy chicken becomes opaque, lightly browned and juicy
steps.runwayRisk: raw-to-cooked chicken transformation should be handled with hard cuts

steps.text: Stir black beans into the chicken mixture.
steps.visualCue: black beans tumble through chicken and chiles until evenly combined
steps.textureCue: matte beans contrast with moist chicken and softened onion
steps.runwayRisk: beans can smear into paste unless kept whole and glossy

steps.text: Set up tortillas, red sauce, chicken filling and shredded cheese for assembly.
steps.visualCue: single tortilla on the island with sauce dragged in a red oval
steps.textureCue: soft pale tortilla against glossy red sauce
steps.runwayRisk: avoid neutral mise en place; show one active assembly action

steps.text: Spread two tablespoons of sauce over a tortilla, add chicken filling and cheese down the center.
steps.visualCue: filling forms a line with melted-cheese promise inside sauced tortilla
steps.textureCue: soft tortilla, glossy sauce, chunky filling and shredded cheese strands
steps.runwayRisk: center line can become messy; use a generated filled tortilla state reference

steps.text: Roll the tortilla and place seam-side down in a greased 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
steps.visualCue: hands tuck and roll a soft tortilla into a neat cylinder
steps.textureCue: pliable tortilla folds around chunky filling without tearing
steps.runwayRisk: rolling can create extra hands or impossible folds; use simple single-motion shots

steps.text: Repeat with remaining tortillas, then cover the row of enchiladas with remaining sauce and extra cheese.
steps.visualCue: red sauce flows over parallel tortilla rolls and shredded cheese rains down
steps.textureCue: sauce cloak pooling between tortilla ridges, pale cheese blanket on top
steps.runwayRisk: parallel roll geometry should be stabilized with a pan state reference

steps.text: Bake uncovered until hot, melty and slightly crispy on the outside.
steps.visualCue: bubbling red edges, melted cheese blisters and lightly crisped tortilla rims
steps.textureCue: liquid sauce becomes bubbling edges, cheese turns glossy and blistered
steps.runwayRisk: baked reveal needs a before/after hard cut rather than continuous morphing

steps.visualCue: cilantro, avocado, red onion, crema and cotija land on melty enchiladas
steps.textureCue: cool fresh toppings contrast with steaming sauce and melted cheese
steps.runwayRisk: tiny garnish drift is likely; prefer a few bold toppings and a final state reference

assumptions: Use the source default of large flour tortillas for clear rolling geometry.
Use the linked homemade red enchilada sauce because the source identifies it as the key flavor and visual binder.
Keep optional toppings to cilantro, avocado, red onion, crema and cotija for strong color contrast without overcrowding.
Compress repetitive rolling and make-ahead/freezer notes out of the video because they are not needed for the ASMR production.
criticalTransformations: Flour-oil roux blooms with chili powder into a rust-red paste before stock turns it into glossy enchilada sauce.
Red sauce thickens from thin stock into a smooth spoon-coating liquid with low simmer bubbles.
Chicken pieces move from raw glossy cubes to opaque, juicy cooked pieces with green chile flecks.
Beans fold into the chicken without breaking down into paste.
Sauced tortilla wraps around chunky filling into a clean cylinder that preserves seam and roll direction.
Parallel tortilla rolls become a full baking dish with sauce pooling between ridges and cheese covering the top.
Baking changes cheese from dry shreds to melted glossy blisters and sauce from flat red layer to bubbling edges.
Fresh toppings create cool color contrast on a hot steaming red-and-gold surface.
visualTextureOpportunities: Macro red enchilada sauce ribbon pouring over tortilla ridges.
Chili powder blooming in oil as a rust-red paste around a whisk.
Low simmer bubbles bursting in thick red sauce.
Onion sizzle and steam in a hot pan.
Green chile flecks clinging to opaque chicken cubes.
Black beans tumbling through the filling as whole glossy beads.
Spoon dragging sauce into an oval on a soft tortilla.
Shredded cheese falling over a chunky filling line.
Hands tucking a tortilla into a neat roll.
Cheese raining across sauced parallel enchiladas.
Oven reveal with bubbling red edges and blistered cheese.
Crema drizzle, avocado cubes and cilantro landing on the hot pan.
Serving spoon lift stretching cheese from the pan.
possibleHooks: Red enchilada sauce cascades over a row of rolled tortillas before a hard cut back to the chili roux that made it.
A serving spoon lifts one enchilada and pulls a molten cheese strand, then snaps back to the first sauce pour.
Chili powder blooms into oil and flour in one rust-red whisk swirl, promising the homemade sauce payoff.
Cheese shreds fall like a blanket over red-sauced tortillas, immediately followed by oven bubbling.
Crema draws a white line across steaming red enchiladas, then toppings pop green, purple and pale white.
